facts.subject: copper key
facts.evidence: Mara keeps the copper key inside her sleeve before entering the archive room.

facts.subject: ledger page
facts.evidence: She finds that one ledger page is missing.

facts.subject: archive page removal
facts.evidence: The torn binding shows that the page was removed after the archive bell rang.

characters.name: Mara
characters.state: Holds the copper key and knows the ledger page is missing.
characters.evidence: Mara leaves the room with the copper key still in her sleeve and asks Oren to guard the door.

debts.title: Missing ledger page
debts.detail: The missing page must be traced before the archive secret is revealed.
debts.evidence: She finds that one ledger page is missing.

handoff: Agent B should trace the missing ledger page, keep the copper key with Mara, and avoid revealing who removed the page.
